name: LEMIERRE SYNDROME
definition: SEPTIC JUGULAR VEIN THROMBOPHLEBITIS = POSTANGINAL SEPSIS = uncommon potentially life-threatening complication of acute oropharyngeal infection

demographics.Age: adolescent, teenager, young adult > infant, child

discriminating_features: edema of the surrounding soft tissues + wall of jugular vein

general: edema of the surrounding soft tissues + wall of jugular vein
"feeding vessel" sign = vessel leading into nodule
peripheral enhancement with central areas of reduced attenuation = cavitation

clinical.Cx: systemic dissemination of infection: pleuropulmonary septic emboli (97%), septic arthritis
clinical.Rx: prolonged IV antibiotics with anaerobic activity, anticoagulation
